title: Build Stuff
description: Modpack that I made for building, its mostly just some mods that improve the building experience and your builds.
body:
In this modpack you can use these quality mods to make your building experience better. Upgrade your builds with many different furniture mods and more. Enjoy making your dream builds come true.

Decoration- Uses many different mods such as Another furniture, and Decorative Blocks to help you decorate your builds and make them pop!

Food- Uses mods like Let's Do, Lot's More Food, and Culinaire to add tons of different foods to choose from. You can make your dream restaurant!.

Optimization- Some mods that make your FPS perfect, such as Sodium, ImmediatelyFast, and many others!

Visuals- Mods such as Visuality, Iris, and CameraOverhaul to make your game more appealing and immersive.

Multiplayer- Uses the mod Essential to let your friends join your world. You can build together with your friends and have fun!

I hope that sums it all up, enjoy these awesome mods and have a great day!
